description: Registry of *.pending.test.js files — tests that assert on a surface that does not yet exist in runtime. Pending tests are excluded from the default test lane (tools/run-node-tests.js) and live here with owner + expiry/issue so aspirational work cannot pile up invisibly. Every *.pending.test.js file must have an entry here; every entry must point to an existing file. Expired entries fail tools/check-pending-tests.js.

fields.feature: One sentence describing the missing runtime surface the test asserts on.
fields.owner: Person or team accountable for either shipping the feature or retiring the test.
fields.created: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the test entered the pending lane.
fields.expires: ISO date the pending status lapses — after which the entry fails the check. Required unless `issue` is set.
fields.issue: Tracking URL for the missing feature. Required unless `expires` is set.
fields.expectedMissing: Array of symbol/module/endpoint names the test expects to exist but that the runtime does not yet export.

entries.feature: Public logits API (advanced.prefillWithLogits / advanced.decodeStepLogits) on the Doppler client surface.
Rename of the demo/examples import specifier from @doppler/core to @simulatte/doppler, plus the browser-chat.html import-map entry pointing at d4da.com.
